about-image-2f81c3.query:
Founded in a small workshop in Giessen, the Netherlands, in 1987, Artitect Machinery
              has spent nearly four decades obsessing over a single craft: making sheet metal fold
              cleanly, precisely, and predictably. Three generations of folding metal — the right way. machinist engineer calibrating large industrial sheet metal folder factory
